config.jellyfin.apikey_empty: Please enter an API key first.
config.jellyfin.apikey_save_failed: Failed to save API key to vault.
help.jellyfin.enabled: Enables the Jellyfin integration. The agent can browse libraries, search media, control playback, and manage your media server.
help.jellyfin.readonly: In read-only mode, the agent can only view data. Playback control and library refresh are blocked.
help.jellyfin.allow_destructive: Allows deleting media items from the Jellyfin server.
help.jellyfin.use_https: Uses HTTPS for the connection to the Jellyfin server.
help.jellyfin.insecure_ssl: Accepts self-signed or invalid certificates (for test environments only).
help.jellyfin.host: Hostname or IP address of your Jellyfin server (e.g. jellyfin.local or 192.168.1.100).
help.jellyfin.api_key: API key for the Jellyfin API. Create one under Dashboard → API Keys in Jellyfin.
